positive: A cute, kawaii-style illustration of a plump, happy sloth hanging from a tropical vine. The sloth is wearing a tiny floral lei. The background should be soft, bright, and filled with stylized tropical foliage. Japanese cartoon style, high saturation, adorable, vector illustration.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, scary, dark, realistic fur, messy lines
